channel.title: Owlz's nest
channel.copyright: Anything here is under MIT license.

item.title: About me
item.description: Hi, I am Luca Di Luccio. Nice to meet you! I am currently studying computer science in Italy at the “Università degli Studi di Salerno”, my master degree curriculum is “Internet of Things”. I love talking and working on exciting and cutting edge projects. Contact me if you think I can help you! Sometimes i write articles about things that really matter to me such as: - Functional Programming - ?
